{# tabs/offers.html — Historical offers from this vendor. Receives: offers (list of Offer ORM objects), vendor_id (int). Called by: views.py vendor_tab endpoint (tab_name='offers'). Depends on: none (read-only display). #}

Offers History

{% if offers %} {% for offer in offers %} {% endfor %}
MPN Qty Unit Price Status Date
{{ offer.mpn or '-' }} {{ offer.qty_available or '-' }} {{ '$%.4f' | format(offer.unit_price) if offer.unit_price else '-' }} {{ offer.status or 'unknown' }} {{ offer.created_at.strftime('%b %d, %Y') if offer.created_at else '-' }}
{% else %}

No offers from this vendor yet.

{% endif %}
